description: Schema definitions for the R13.2 mini formal dataset. Defines both the processed sample input format and the gold annotation format.

processed_sample_schema.description: Schema for each regulatory sentence/clause sample in the processed mini dataset (data/formal/processed/formal_mini_samples.jsonl).

source_ref.description: Article/paragraph/section reference in the source document

text.description: The exact regulatory sentence text, copied verbatim from source

license_status.description: License status of the source text

provenance_note.description: How and when this sample was obtained from the source

processing_date.description: ISO 8601 date when sample was extracted/processed

gold_annotation_schema.description: Schema for each gold annotation in the manual mini-gold dataset (data/formal/gold/manual_mini/gold_samples.jsonl).

sample_id.description: Matches a processed sample. Suffix letter for multi-clause splits.

modality.description: Deontic modality of the clause. Use 'unknown' when uncertain.

actor.description: The entity performing or subject to the action. null if not present.

action.description: The verb phrase describing the normative action. null if not applicable.

condition.description: Prerequisite or triggering condition. null if not present.

constraint.description: Limitation, scope, or boundary on the action. null if not present.

exception.description: Exclusion or carve-out from the rule. null if not present.

violation_type.description: Violation type. Only populated for process-model samples.

violation_status.description: Violation detection result. Only populated for process-model samples.

bpmn_model_ref.description: Reference to BPMN model file. Only populated for process-model samples.

annotation_status.description: Annotation review status. Only 'reviewed_gold' samples are considered final.

reviewer_notes.description: Free-text notes from the reviewer about annotation decisions or ambiguities.

annotation_date.description: ISO 8601 date when annotation was created or last reviewed.

annotator.description: Identifier of the person who created the annotation.

claim_boundary.note: This schema defines project-created mini dataset formats. It is NOT derived from original Sun data. No benchmark or method-validation claims are made.
